lines.speaker: Kelyn
lines.text: Huh... Oh sorry, you made me jump. I was miles away, day dreaming.

lines.speaker: Kelyn
lines.text: I was thinking about the crystal spires of Prifddinas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It must be beautiful, I've only seen the city walls.

lines.speaker: Kelyn
lines.text: I have never seen it, all I know are the stories. I hope that changes one day.

lines.speaker: Kelyn
lines.text: I have never seen it, all I know are the stories. I hope that once this war is over, I'll finally be able to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How is it being the new Lady Ithell?

lines.speaker: Lady Kelyn Ithell
lines.text: It's a daunting job, but I have the knowledge of my predecessor to help me.

lines.speaker: Lady Kelyn Ithell
lines.text: It's still crazy how fast it all happened. One moment I was a daydreaming elf, who'd never even seen Prifddinas. Now I'm responsible for an entire elf clan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well don't worry, I'm sure you're doing great.

lines.speaker: Kelyn
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?
